# Banks pending re-harvest — transitional allow-list
#
# Banks listed here have a known harvester recipe gap that prevents
# the captured static HTML from containing the credential input(s)
# needed to drive Mode A + Mode B integration tests.
#
# The coverage gate (CheckBankIntegrationCoverage.ts) downgrades these
# banks from FAIL → tracked as pending operator work. Tests for these
# banks skip with a comment pointing to this file.
#
# Operator workflow:
#   1. Run `npx tsx src/Tests/Integration/Tools/HarvestBankHtml.ts <bankId>`
#   2. Verify the loginStep HTML contains <input type="password"> or
#      <input id="password|tzPassword|otpLoginPwd">
#   3. Commit the new fixtures
#   4. Remove the bankId from this allow-list
#   5. Re-run pre-commit — the bank should now DRIVE green in both modes
#
# Format: one bankId per line. Lines starting with `#` are comments.
#
# ── Currently pending (5) ──
# VisaCal     recipe gap: SPA hydration not complete at capture time.
#             RESOLVED IN HARVESTER (waitForCredentialInput flag is
#             wired into BANK_RECIPES.visaCal). Closure pending
#             operator re-harvest:
#               npx tsx src/Tests/Integration/Tools/HarvestBankHtml.ts visaCal
#             After fresh capture has <input type="password"> in
#             02-pre-login.html, flip BankFixtureExpectations.ts
#             visaCal requiresHydration → false and remove this entry.
visaCal
#
# Massad      recipe gap: login form has a tab/accordion-toggle UI
#             that reveals the password tab only after click. Harvester
#             needs `click-password-tab` step before capture.
massad
#
# Pagi        recipe gap: same as Massad — click-password-tab step needed.
pagi
#
# OtsarHahayal recipe gap: same as Massad — click-password-tab step needed.
otsarHahayal
#
# Amex        iframe-cascade timeout in CI (NOT a credential-input gap).
#             Captured 03-after-flip/main.html DOES have <input type="password">
#             (so PR #335 C1 correctly unskipped it). HOWEVER the captured
#             frames.json declares 9 cross-origin iframes (digital + delivery
#             + sso + analytics) that MirrorInterceptor does NOT route.
#             On a 16-core local box the cascade completes in ~49s; on the
#             2-vCPU GitHub runner the cascade exceeds the 240s test ceiling
#             (observed at run 27310470121 / job 80679158069). Same root
#             cause that originally placed AMEX here in PR #322 + PR #331.
#             Per operator binding rule "do not bump timeouts to hide
#             SIMULATOR parity gaps", AMEX stays here until MirrorInterceptor
#             is extended with per-frame routing (separate PR — significant
#             work). AMEX still has FULL Phase-11 coverage via Mode A static
#             drive + Mode B SIMULATOR drive — only the cross-bank
#             LoginNavigation.mirror.test.ts is skipped.
amex
